candidates.name: Cold Mail Variable Engine – Personalized Email at Scale
candidates.pitch: Browser-side template engine with merge variables for name, company, role, and recent news. Auto-fills into Gmail compose. AI rewrite suggestions available on paid tier. Build time under 3 weeks since
candidates.pain: Salespeople waste 20 minutes per email manually personalizing cold outreach instead of closing deals.

candidates.name: Meeting Cost Counter – Real-Time Salary-Based Meeting Cost
candidates.pitch: Input attendee salary bands once, then every Google Meet or Zoom tab shows a live dollar counter. Uses tab title matching and a simple hourly rate calculation. Two-week build with clear viral demo pot
candidates.pain: Teams schedule endless meetings without realizing the cumulative salary cost burning through the budget.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Sales Lead Enricher – One-Click Company Context on Any Page
candidates.pitch: Button on any page showing a company name or LinkedIn profile that enriches it with funding, headcount, recent news, and tech stack from public sources. Free tier gives 5 enriches/day; paid unlimited.
candidates.pain: Sales reps manually Google prospects before calls and lose 10 minutes of prep per meeting.

candidates.name: Job Board Radar – Unified Job Posting Aggregator
candidates.pitch: Scrapes and deduplicates job postings from 6+ major boards into one feed with one-click apply tracking. One engineer can build the scraper + UI in under 4 weeks. Demand is rising as job markets shift
candidates.pain: Checking LinkedIn, Indeed, Greenhouse, and Lever separately wastes hours each week on duplicate listings.

candidates.name: PR Comment Inbox – Unified Pull Request Notifications
candidates.pitch: Aggregates all PR review comments into a single browser inbox with keyboard navigation and quick-reply. A single background script can poll all three APIs simultaneously. Developer productivity tools
candidates.pain: Context-switching between GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket to check PR comments burns hours of deep work time.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.pain: Cleaning up inbox subscriptions means clicking through dozens of unsubscribe pages one at a time.

candidates.name: API Response Shapes – Visual Inline API Examples
candidates.pitch: When browsing any API reference page, this extension overlays real JSON response examples inline next to each endpoint. Uses a sidepanel to render structured data as collapsible trees. Fast to build g
candidates.pain: Reading API docs requires mentally visualizing response structures instead of seeing real data.

candidates.pitch: GitHub/Bitbucket API scraper that groups commits by type (feat, fix, breaking) and formats them into a release notes draft. One-click copy to markdown. Built in under 10 days using commit message conv
candidates.pain: Writing changelogs is tedious boilerwork that developers procrastinate until release day.
